headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.vercel.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.vercel.app; img-src 'self' blob: data: https://*.vercel.app; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; block-all-mixed-content; upgrade-insecure-requests;
